best_bet.reason: The slightly bigger surf at 2 to 4 feet combined with moderate rip current risk and that upcoming low tide makes it the sweet spot for swimmers and anglers looking for more water action than Brunswick has to offer.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
